entities.name: VILLAGE LEVEL STUDIES
entities.description: Data collection approach by ICRISAT to study farm-level data and generate technologies for semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where the studies were conducted and rainfed agriculture is practiced

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The general practice of farming and crop production

entities.name: VILLAGE ECONOMIES
entities.description: The economic systems and financial structures of rural villages

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where the villages Aurepalle and Dokur are located

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: An Indian state where the villages Kalman, Kanzara, Kinkheda, and Shirapur are located

entities.name: AUREPALLE
entities.description: A village in Andhra Pradesh included in the study

entities.name: DOKUR
entities.description: A village in Andhra Pradesh included in the study

entities.name: KALMAN
entities.description: A village in Maharashtra included in the study

entities.name: KANZARA
entities.description: A village in Maharashtra included in the study

entities.name: KINKHEDA
entities.description: A village in Maharashtra included in the study

entities.name: SHIRAPUR
entities.description: A village in Maharashtra included in the study

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The organization and management of agricultural activities in rural areas

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Social and economic barriers faced by the farming community

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Barriers related to organizational or legal structures in farming

entities.name: JOINT FAMILIES
entities.description: Traditional family structures that were dominant in the early period of the study

entities.name: NUCLEAR FAMILIES
entities.description: Smaller family units that emerged as joint families disappeared

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total financial earnings of a rural household

entities.name: CROP ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Business activities focused on the production of crops

entities.name: LIVESTOCK ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Business activities focused on the raising of animals

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The arrangement and sequence of crops grown on land

entities.name: CASH CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for commercial sale

entities.name: FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for sustenance and consumption

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: PRODUCTION COSTS
entities.description: The expenses associated with agricultural production

entities.name: PRODUCT PRICES
entities.description: The market value received for agricultural products

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies on rainfall rather than irrigation
